overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game depicting a sunlit Gothic palace terrace with ornate stone balustrades overlooking a mountain valley. The camera slowly orbits around two children playing on the marble floor while an adult figure observes from the background, with one child eventually standing and running off-screen.

segments.scene_description: The camera circles clockwise around two children seated on a sunlit marble terrace. Gothic stone balustrades with pointed arches frame the background, overlooking a distant mountain valley. The children sit facing each other while an adult figure stands observing near the railing, and tall cypress trees rise against the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic palace terrace overlooking mountain valley

events.description: blonde child stands up from seated position and begins running toward the right side of the terrace

agents.ego_description: continuing to orbit around the scene as the blonde child stands and runs off toward the right

notable_agents.action: blonde child running toward the right edge of the terrace and exiting the scene
red-haired child remaining seated on the ground watching the other child leave

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its clockwise orbit, the blonde child suddenly stands up and runs off toward the right side of the terrace, leaving the red-haired child seated alone. The Gothic balustrade shifts from the left to the right side of the frame as the camera moves, maintaining the warm sunlight and open mountain vista in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around two children on a sunlit Gothic terrace that shifts from a shared moment of play to a scene of solitary stillness. It begins by circling the children seated on a marble floor, with ornate stone balustrades and tall cypress trees framing a distant mountain valley under a clear sky. As the camera maintains its steady rotation, a blonde child suddenly stands and runs off toward the right side of the terrace, leaving a red-haired child seated alone. The scene then shifts its perspective as the Gothic railing glides from the left to the right of the frame, keeping the warm sunlight and open vista constant throughout the movement.
